About Me

  • I am Devansh, I go by bittcrak online.
  • I like to learn new things and play around with the knowledge.
  • My initial entrypoint into STEM was from electronics and then I graduated from School and got into a Computer Science Bachelor’s program.
  • Since, then I have been learning more and more about low level computer science.
  • Currently I am looking to level up my coding skills and simultaneously get better at reverse engineering and binary exploitation.
  • I want to be a god low level dev, doing something around exploits or malware or both.
  • I also like to read books, no preferences just any book would do.
